title: Consider Defense ETFs Amid Positive Industry Outlook
text: With the current geopolitical landscape and increasing demand for defense equipment, investing in defense ETFs can be beneficial.

title: The 7 Best S&P 500 Stocks to Buy in December
text: When it comes to the best S&P 500 stocks, the largest components of this market-cap weighed stock index may come to mind. For example, “Magnificent Seven” tech stocks, like Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ), Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG ), and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA ).

title: The 3 Best Defense Stocks to Buy in December
text: Investors got a jolt back to reality about the volatile geopolitical landscape after the Hamas attacks on Israel. When the news broke, the best defense stocks rallied.

title: RTX Secures a $321M Contract to Build Silent Knight Radar Systems
text: RTX will be engaged in the continued production and delivery of Silent Knight Radar systems and initial spare components to support USSOCOM.

title: RTX Secures a $225M Navy Contract to Aid Radar Production
text: RTX wins a contract to provide integration and production support for Air and Missile Defense Radar and Enterprise Air Surveillance Radar.
